title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE's DJ VIDEO🎧
【Dizzy and high】
old rock.slow bossa.avant pop feat. The High Llamas and more hypnotic  tune.
flower power. no war.


今回はThe High Llamas - "Glide Time"からThe Shadows – “Spring Is Nearly Here”へのシーンをお届け。
浮遊感のあるハイラマズらしいエレクトロニカから柔らかい陽射しが差し込むようなギターの音色が心地よい春の訪れを感じる楽曲への繋ぎをお楽しみください。

This time, we’re bringing you a scene from The High Llamas’ “Glide Time” to The Shadows’ “Spring Is Nearly Here.”
Enjoy the transition from The High Llamas’ signature floating electronica to a track that feels like the arrival of spring, with guitar tones as gentle as soft sunlight.
